name: SuperGrok 7 Days

howToRedeem:
1. Open the official website or app for this product.
2. Sign in with the Username and Password from your delivery package.
3. Do not change the password, email, or billing details.

Personal use only — follow the official service terms.
Breaking these rules voids refunds and support.
